questions.prompt_html:
The iterated integral J =dy is the double integral of g(x,y) over a planar region R.
(i)Sketch the planar region R.
(ii)Express the double integral J as a sum of two iterated integrals with the order of the integrals 
reversed.
questions.prompt_text: The iterated integral J = integral of (dx) from (1) to (4) integral of (g(x,y)) from (8/x) to (9 -x) dy is the double integral of g(x,y) over a planar region R. (i) Sketch the planar region R. (ii) Express the double integral J as a sum of two iterated integrals with the order of the integrals reversed.
questions.solution_html:
(i)

(ii) J = dx + dx
questions.solution_text: (i) Short Description: A graph shows y = 8 over x as a concave up curve sloping downward from (1, 8) to (4, 2), y = 9 minus x as a line sloping downward from (1, 8) to (4, 5), and x = 4 as a vertical line from (4, 2) to (4, 5). (ii) J = integral of (dy) from (2) to (5) integral of (g(x,y)) from (8/y) to (4) dx + integral of (dy) from (5) to (8) integral of (g(x,y)) from (8/y) to (9 -y) dx
